commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a `Deadcode` step to `.github/workflows/ci.yml` that runs `golang.org/x/tools/cmd/deadcode@v0.45.0 -test ./...`, captures stdout, and fails CI when findings are emitted.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a CI policy PR, not a bug report. Source inspection confirms current main lacks the deadcode step and the PR adds it to the workflow.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Human review is the right lane because the remaining decision is CI policy and hosted workflow validation, not a narrow code defect for a repair worker.

target.title: ci: add deadcode check
target.body:
## Summary
- add an enforced Go deadcode CI gate pinned to `golang.org/x/tools/cmd/deadcode@v0.45.0`
- make the workflow fail when deadcode emits findings

## Validation
- `git diff --check`
- `go run golang.org/x/tools/cmd/deadcode@v0.45.0 -test ./...`
- `go test -count=1 ./...`
- `go build ./cmd/songsee`
- `autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main --no-web-search --thinking low` clean
target.author: vincentkoc
